name: react_15_3_wix_iframe
description: Legacy development for Wix iFrame apps on React 15.3: class components, lifecycle methods, PropTypes/defaultProps, patterns without hooks. Communication with Wix via iFrame SDK (postMessage, Wix.addEventListener, resizeWindow). ALWAYS use this skill when Wix iFrame, Wix iFrame SDK are mentioned, or when the codebase explicitly uses React 15.3. Do not apply together with react_beast_practices — they are mutually exclusive.
default_prompt: Use $react_15_3_wix_iframe when the task matches the "React 15.3 + Wix iFrame" skill.
triggers: Legacy development for Wix iFrame apps on React 15
